title: Microsoft Teams App functionality for Australia
excerpt: After a chat with the Monday Support team, they let me know that the Monday app does not have full functionality within MS Teams for Australians (e.g., I cannot add it as a ‘tab’ within a Teams channel). It’s a requireme…

posts.author: Kieran1 (Kieran)
posts.cookedHtml:
After a chat with the Monday Support team, they let me know that the Monday app does not have full functionality within MS Teams for Australians (e.g., I cannot add it as a ‘tab’ within a Teams channel). It’s a requirement if I’m going to move our team over to Monday (which I was quite excited for!), and we’ll have to find another solution. Pretty average to only have advertised functionality available in some regions!

“I found that this functionality is not available with monday accounts based on our Austrialian server. You can integrate your account with Microsoft Teams, but at this time we have the limitation of adding monday as a tab to embed your account.”

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: Has this been added monday.com Support Team? No mention in the support article that Australia doesn’t have the functionality.
